source_product.name: Nappa Leather Wrap Skirt
source_product.care_instructions: Specialist leather clean only; store away from direct sunlight

generated_copy.description: A wrap skirt cut from supple lamb nappa with a clean front overlap and a viscose lining for smooth wear. The black finish reads sharp against lighter knits and structured jackets. Designed to sit at the natural waist with a fluid drape through the hem.
generated_copy.seo_title: Nappa Leather Wrap Skirt in Black
generated_copy.seo_meta_description: Black nappa leather wrap skirt with viscose lining. Clean overlap front and fluid drape for polished day-to-evening styling.
generated_copy.image_alt_text: Black nappa leather wrap skirt with front overlap and fluid hem

source_product.name: Structured Wool Blazer
source_product.care_instructions: Dry clean only; hang on a shaped hanger

generated_copy.description: Tailored in Italian wool twill with a cupro lining that keeps the interior smooth against layers. The charcoal tone anchors seasonal suiting without reading heavy. Sharp lapels and a shaped shoulder line define a clean, structured silhouette that works easily over knits or fine shirting.
generated_copy.seo_meta_description: Charcoal wool twill blazer with cupro lining, sharp lapels, and a shaped shoulder for refined tailoring.
generated_copy.image_alt_text: Charcoal wool twill blazer with sharp lapels and shaped shoulders

source_product.name: Silk Crepe Bias Dress
source_product.care_instructions: Dry clean recommended; steam lightly from reverse

generated_copy.description: Cut on the bias in silk crepe de chine so the fabric falls with a quiet, liquid movement. Deep olive adds depth without overt shine. The clean lines keep the focus on drape and proportion rather than embellishment, making it easy to dress up or down.
generated_copy.seo_title: Silk Crepe Bias Dress in Deep Olive
generated_copy.seo_meta_description: Deep olive silk crepe de chine bias dress with fluid drape and clean, minimal lines.
generated_copy.image_alt_text: Deep olive silk crepe bias dress with fluid drape
